title: Two Girls on the Street
writer: André De Toth, Tamás Emöd, Rezsö Török
actors: Bella Bordy, Mária Tasnádi Fekete, Piroska Vaszary
plot: A musician in an all-girl band and a bricklayer join forces as they both try to make it in Budapest, supporting each other through changing economic fortunes, the advances of lecherous men, and the highs and heartbreaks of love.
